The '''Gladean State Parks''' were a group of parks on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]] known for their beautiful gardens, which were beloved throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="Force and Destiny">[[Star Wars: Force and Destiny Core Rulebook|''Star Wars: Force and Destiny'' Core Rulebook]]</ref>

==Description==
Funded through a tax on industry, the Gladean State Parks were created by the [[Emita/Legends|Emita]] [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Gladean]] several millennia before the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. This tax was distributed to the governors of Chandrila to fund local parks and reserves. The State Parks brought tourism from across the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]], and were staffed by the [[Chandrilan Park Ranger Service]]'s scouts, hunters, and survivalists.

{{Nature-stub}}
